statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1044 — Brocard's problem n ∈ [151, 170] Lean 4 extension
  ==============================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 1018 (n ∈ [131, 150]). Same Nat.sqrt-based O(log) approach.

  Target: n ∈ [151, 170] non-square verification (20 new theorems).
  Combined with STEP 980/990/993/1015/1016/1017/1018/Brocard base:
    Rei-AIOS Brocard coverage n ∈ [1, 170] (~181 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Berndt-Galway 2000: N ≤ 10⁹ (Brocard's problem search limit).
    - Rei contribution: Lean 4 mechanical verification first record continues.
    - Brocard conjec
